reference: I contracted Hepatitis A exactly one year ago. It took four months for my total bilirubin level to return to normal, which is zero point six seven. Since then, I have been feeling weak. My doctor keeps telling me to eat more and more. I have no solution except to increase my weight. I am not getting my energy levels back, and my bilirubin levels are fluctuating. My recent readings are zero point nine, zero point five six, and one point three, etc. I resigned from my job one year ago and do not feel well enough to return. My doctor is giving me antioxidants every time I visit, and I have taken nearly sixty tablets with no progress. What should I do? Could you please suggest a solution to my problem? Nowadays, I am feeling very frustrated.
text: i contracted hepatitis a exactly one year ago it took four months for my total bilirubin level to return to normal which is 0.67 since then i have been feeling weak my doctor keeps telling me to eat more and more i have no solution except to increase my weight i am not getting my energy levels back and my bilirubin levels are fluctuating my recent readings are 0.9 0.56 and 1.3 etc i resigned from my job one year ago and do not feel well enough to return my doctor is giving me antioxidants every time i visit and i have taken nearly 60 tablets with no progress what should i do would you please suggest a solution to my problem nowadays i am feeling very frustrated
